FIRST APPEARANCE FEE REDUCED BY JUDGE TO $240 ON HEARING ON FEE WAIVER APPLICATION FILED BY PETITIONER NGUYEN, THAO MAI
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER NGUYEN, THAO MAI

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-20-2016 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER THAO NGUYEN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE, BUT ALSO ORDERED THAT APPLICANT PAY HALF OF THE TOTAL FEES CURRENTLY OWED WITH THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $240. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PETITIONER NGUYEN, THAO MAI

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PETITIONER PRESENT IN COURT. PROOF OF PUBLICATION ON FILE. HEARING FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME NOT REQUIRED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: A. MOK AND M. GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER NGUYEN, THAO MAI JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
